title: moltkia longiflora
intro: Moltkia longiflora, also known as the long-flowered Moltkia or long-flowered helmet flower, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Moltkia longiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and act as a natural expectorant to relieve coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves can be dried and used as a tea or infused in oil to create topical applications for skin and wound care.
